script: echo === recent activities mtime/size ===; sudo ls -la /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/activities.jsonl /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/outbound.jsonl /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === last 20 lines of activities.jsonl ===; sudo tail -20 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/activities.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -c 4000; echo; echo === last 20 of debug log ===; sudo tail -20 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null | head -c 4000; echo; echo === last 20 of error log ===; sudo tail -20 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null; echo; echo === timer queue ===; systemctl list-timers --all --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'mskai|claude|migrate' || echo no relevant timers
